creator: crest@bultmann.eu
text:
Thy this loader.conf snippet instead:
# Enable both consoles
console="vidconsole,comconsole"
# Set baudrate
comconsole_speed="115200"
# Set serial port
# ttyu0 / COM1: 0x3F8 (default)
# ttyu1 / COM2: 0x2F8
# ttyu2 / COM3: 0x3E8
# ttyu3 / COM4: 0x2E8
comconsole_port="0x3E8"
